asr_es: Señoras y señores diputados, les ruego tomen asiento. Vamos a empezar de conformidad con el orden del día el debate sobre la declaración del Consejo Programa de Actividad de la Presidencia neerlandesa. Tiene la palabra el presidente del Consejo, señor Valkenende.
hypothesis_en: I should like to ask the President-in-Office of the Council whether he is aware of the fact that the European Council meeting in Copenhagen in December last year, in the context of the negotiations for the accession of the new Member States to the European Union, was held in Copenhagen on the same day as the European Council meeting in Copenhagen in December last year.
reference_en: honourable Members could you please be seated (1.43) in accordance with our agenda we shall (1.54) now begin the debate on the (2.06) Council Statement relating to the work programme of the Netherlands presidency (3.66) I give the floor to President Office of the Council Mr Balkenende
source_es: señoras y señores diputados les ruego tomen asiento vamos a empezar de conformidad con el orden del día el debate sobre la declaración del Consejo Programa de Actividad de la Presidencia neerlandesa ((x)) (1.03) tiene la palabra el Presidente del Consejo Señor Balkenende
